headline: How AT&T’s US$6 Billion Long-Dated Debt Deal and NG911 Tie-Up Will Impact AT&T (T) Investors
summary: In April 2026, AT&T Inc. completed a multi-tranche US$6.00 billion global notes offering with maturities ranging from 2033 to 2066, intending to use the proceeds for general corporate purposes including debt repayment and pending acquisitions. Separately, RapidSOS announced that its HARMONY AI platform is now delivered over AT&T ESInet, integrating real-time public safety intelligence directly into the nation’s most widely deployed NG911 infrastructure. Next, we’ll explore how AT&T’s large...
